# Generate Task Breakdown

Convert the provided content into an actionable engineering task breakdown.

## Structure Output As

# Task Breakdown

## Main Tasks

- [ ]

## Subtasks

- [ ]

## Dependencies

## Risks / Notes

## Instructions

- Break larger ideas into actionable development tasks.
- Preserve technical constraints/details.
- Use markdown checkboxes.
- Group related tasks together logically.
- Return markdown only.
